memory: Architecture: skills/ dir with SKILL.md per skill, orchestrator at production-grade
Decision: using JSONL for memory store, committed to git (versioned)
Current task: building mem0-based memory skill for persistent context
Project: Forge17 v7.1.0 — Production-grade AI pipeline orchestrator
Architecture: skills/ directory with SKILL.md per skill, orchestrator at production-grade, phases at production-grade/phases/. Total skills: 47, Total modes: 19
Pipeline: DEFINE → BUILD → HARDEN → SHIP → SUSTAIN → GROW. 3 approval gates. 4 engagement modes: Express, Standard, Thorough, Meticulous
Storage: memory.jsonl (JSONL, git-committed). Search: TF-IDF with cosine similarity. GC: value-weighted by category × recency

47 AI Skills · 19 Modes · Full Lifecycle Pipeline

Research → Design → Build → Test → Secure → Deploy → Market → Grow
The only AI pipeline that covers the complete lifecycle — from SaaS to AAA games.

Built from claude-code-production-grade-plugin, awesome-claude-skills, and agency-agents. Entirely vibe coded 🎵

chmod +x setup.sh && ./setup.sh install
